summary: Iteration 13: Attendance Page (Saisie Globale des Séances) testing complete. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with Playwright - all components working correctly including grid cells, navigation, year selector, search filter, and save functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: AttendancePage.js: Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Grid uses native HTML table for performance as noted in requirements
Color coding works correctly: red=1, amber=2, yellow=3, green=4+ sessions
Sidebar shows 'Saisie Séances' menu item with correct active state
Cell editing triggers onBlur save to backend via POST /api/trainings
Year selector and week navigation working correctly
Search filter correctly filters members by name
Backend /api/trainings endpoints properly implement CRUD operations with upsert behavior
TrainingMap correctly builds member_id + week key for efficient lookup
Weekly totals and member totals calculated correctly
Footer row shows totals per week as required
seed_data_creation: Using existing seed data with 10 members and training records for 2024 (52 weeks per member)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attendance page fully functional. All data-testids present: attendance-page, attendance-search, attendance-year, prev-weeks, next-weeks, save-all-btn, cell-{member_id}-w{week}. Backend endpoints: GET /api/trainings (with year/week/member_id filters), POST /api/trainings (upsert), GET /api/trainings/summary/{member_id}. Grid shows 10 members with 8 weeks displayed at a time (S4-S11 by default for 2024).

frontend_attendance_page.sidebar_menu_item: PASS - 'Saisie Séances' visible and active when on page
frontend_attendance_page.week_navigation_prev: PASS - data-testid='prev-weeks' shifts week range backward
frontend_attendance_page.week_navigation_next: PASS - data-testid='next-weeks' shifts week range forward
frontend_attendance_page.grid_member_names: PASS - Shows member name and membership type (e.g., 'Camille Roux' + '3 Mois')
frontend_attendance_page.totals_column: PASS - Shows sum per member (e.g., Emma Richard: 33)
frontend_attendance_page.footer_totals_row: PASS - Shows 'Total / semaine' with weekly totals
frontend_attendance_page.color_coding: PASS - red=1, amber=2, yellow=3, green=4+ visible in cells

backend_trainings_api.GET_trainings_list: PASS - Returns array of training records
backend_trainings_api.GET_trainings_by_year: PASS - year=2024 filter works, returns 500+ records
backend_trainings_api.training_record_structure: PASS - Has id, member_id, calendar_year, calendar_week, trainings_count (no _id)
backend_trainings_api.GET_training_summary: PASS - Returns total_trainings, weeks_tracked, avg_per_week, engagement_level
backend_trainings_api.training_summary_by_year: PASS - year filter works on summary endpoint

integration_tests.cell_edit_and_blur: PASS - Editing cell value and blurring triggers POST /api/trainings
integration_tests.data_flow: PASS - Get members + Get trainings + Update training + Verify update
